text:
- **Archeologist**: bulk-historical replay; groups by `normalize_path(resolve_project_root(cwd))` (full path, NOT basename); `--project`, `--output-dir`, `--dry-run`, `--yes`, `--jobs`; serial chronological replay; idempotent via `is_already_captured`; `today_override` stamps verified date from transcript timestamp.
   - **Gold-standard comparison methodology**; **regeneration eval** ("dump wiki cold, one-shot rebuild"); **routing is the bottleneck** (empirically confirmed 3×).
